title: chamaecytisus subidaeus
intro: Chamaecytisus subalpinus, also known as the Alpine broom or Subalpine broom, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chamaecytisus subalpinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
